Agenda

Schedule

Every session, every stage, every time slot. Explore the full program across all three days.

Pre-Congress Day

Arrive, Check In, and Warm Up

Pick up your badge, then join the warm-up program at CityCube Berlin — including the Airstream programme, workshops, and full-day masterclasses. Workshops and masterclasses require separate registration.

  • Check-in & Badge Pickup
  • Warm-Up Program
  • Full-Day Masterclasses
  • Workshops
  • Networking

Pre-Check-in Locations

  • CityCube Berlin · Messedamm 26, 14055 Berlin → Map
  • GetYourGuide · Sonnenburger Straße 73, 10437 Berlin → Map
  • Computerspiele Museum · Karl-Marx-Allee 93a, 10243 Berlin → Map
